## Checklist

- [ ] `composer ci` passes locally (phpcs + phpstan)
- [ ] Code follows project conventions (PHP 8.2, `declare(strict_types=1)`, constructor property promotion)
- [ ] Public API changes are documented in the README
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `.env` files are included in the diff
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under FSL-1.1-MIT (inbound = outbound)
